data_description.listen_host: Address Home Assistant listens on. Use 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces.
data_description.listen_port: Port the Level Sense Pro connects to.
data_description.upstream_host_header: Vendor cloud hostname sent in the HTTP Host header.
data_description.upstream_host: Normally leave blank. When blank, the observer resolves the cloud hostname automatically while bypassing local DNS rewrites. Enter an IP address only for testing or troubleshooting.
data_description.log_payloads: Write every raw device payload to the Home Assistant log. Use only for troubleshooting.
data_description.show_raw_sensors: Create additional raw telemetry entities for every observed raw channel.

reconfigure.title: Level Sense Pro Observer connection settings
reconfigure.description: Update proxy and cloud connection settings.
